adjudication_pass: P3R2 second pass (wave F + fix verification)
firewall: Founder profile and prior SEEDS_A-D drafts not read; no founder-fit content; seed files not modified.

compliance.quarantine_check: All 42 quarantined India-origin IDs grepped against P3R2_F_cn_topup.json: zero matches.
compliance.debunked_claims_check: No F seed relies on the L13 '100% localization' or L14 '100% liquid-cooling mandate' media claims; F-19 explicitly disclaims L14-036.

f_seed_adjudication.notes: Strongest new dual seed. Genuinely non-obvious by convergence test (matching documented unresolved in atlas, absent from all 100 prior seeds). Clean complement to A-10 (impedance delivery vs process control). CN leg eligible and country-specific (<12% localization L06-054, named buyers, mature-node scope, 2027 export gate). Absorb F-14's licensing-with-golden-reference mechanics as CN-chapter IP structure. Absorption risk (Comet Synertia) covered by kill trigger; 60 MHz voltage/Q parity is the honest key uncertainty.

required_fixes: P4 pre-promotion: map OCEM/Danfysik-class catalog magnet-PSU incumbency; restate white space as the integrated extraction/dump + leads + acceptance-protocol island, not converter novelty.
Absorb F-21 as entry SKU (catalog leads/feedthroughs, certified heat-load data, end-2031 <$1M entry milestone).
CFS bundling remains the named US ceiling; monitor.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Merchant-magnet commerce (L03-035) is a real structural change; ASIPP tenders (L01-037/038) are dated CN evidence with honest big-science-only access. D-01 complement split mirrors the endorsed A-02/E-14 pattern.

required_fixes: P4 incumbent map centered on Calnetix-class merchant high-speed PM+converter suppliers and turbine-OEM in-house before promotion; white-space claim must survive it.
2029 machine-builder co-development agreement becomes a binding gate.
Triangulate the single-source CN retrofit TAM (L04-051) from eligible sources before any scale assumption.
Absorb F-18 as the CN plant-integration/licensing chapter.
Stage the $900k experiment behind requirements-interview findings.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Fills a real in-pool gap (electrical half of heat-to-power machines) with dual dated anchors (Fervo-Turboden; Chaotan One + first-set).

required_fixes: 2028 paid OEM evaluation proving pump OEMs will externalize AMB electronics (the thesis's stated key uncertainty).
P4 teardown of SKF S2M/Calnetix/Waukesha merchant controllers vs the semiconductor-grade duty claim.
CN leg conditional: name a CN pump/tool-OEM design-in channel in P4 or downgrade primary_market to US (INFICON APAC revenue attribution is not buyer evidence).
Keep the 2032 internal kill.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Real 30-year documented reliability gap (L07-010..013); thinnest CN leg among surviving dual seeds - counted dual-conditional in quota.

required_fixes: P4 competitive teardown vs Danfoss Editron/Dana TM4/BAE off-highway electrics; restate defensible core as UL/IEC/GB certification matrix + dual-personality interface, not kit existence.
CN OEM export-certification engagement LOI by 2028 (the genuinely novel leg: Western-cert competence sold to XCMG-class exporters).
Unsubsidized repower economics model by 2028; the repower inference from EPA grants must be evidenced.
Buy B-14's interface personality as a module; do not rebuild.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: US 'no standardized kit' claim likely overstated; CN certification-demand leg is honest and distinctive.

required_fixes: Honesty flag change: primary_market US+CN -> US, china_beachhead -> false (seed's own text: State Grid domestic-only, CN revenue 'license royalties at best' - same condition that downgraded C-12/C-21). Keep CN license chapter in text; do not count toward CN quota.
2029 OEM/EPC evaluation agreement binding; pair go/no-go with E-14-class third-party protection traction.
P4 map of Hitachi/ABB optical-CT incumbency; wedge is the demonstrated combined accuracy+bandwidth+open-protocol result of the round-robin, not an assertion.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Elegant measurement-layer complement to E-14 with a cheap decisive experiment; structurally dependent on third-party protection winning sockets.

required_fixes: P4 confirmation that CN swap-equipment component procurement is open to licensed outsiders - binding gate for the CN leg (self-flagged: no eligible source documents CN conductive MW-charging demand).
2028 charger-OEM co-development binding.
Connector-major incumbent map (Staubli/Phoenix/Huber+Suhner); wedge proven by the 10,000-mate-cycle duty dataset.
Sequence port/mining (funded) before trucking (MCS volume risk).
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Genuine no-man's-land between EVSE OEMs and connector vendors; CN swap evidence country-specific (SPIC, GB/T 45926, CCS).

Double contingency: component supplier to breaker/valve OEMs whose own market (meshed MVDC) is the atlas's documented unconverged showstopper. Offered demand anchors do not hold (GEV datacenter electrification orders are not MVDC-protection procurement; State Grid valves license-out only). If meshed DC arrives, Infineon/Hitachi/Fuji press-pack scale absorbs the socket before a 2030 entrant qualifies breaker-grade die. IMPORT into A-02: 2027 SiC interruption-duty die-characterization study and fail-short press-pack qualification concept as A-02's device-strategy workstream.

required_fixes: 2028 evaluation windows inside one named rebuild program (ARDAP channel) as binding gate.
P4 evidence on whether tube primes buy reliability-critical components merchant; if negative, re-scope to lab spares/aftermarket and size honestly.
Keep the two-paying-customers-by-2032 kill.
Evaluate one beam-components portfolio company with C-09/D-07 adjacency at P4.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Documented failure mode (L05-014), honest small-TAM admission; prime internalization is the killer question.

required_fixes: CN demand bridge binding: battery-equipment OEM co-development/design-in LOI by 2028 (inline volumetric QC demand is inferential; only the equipment channel is documented).
Refresh L16-028 (2022-vintage buyer concentration) with a current filing.
De-weight the US pipeline leg until a named operator/NDT-service evaluation exists by 2028 (standards-cycle timing is not a procurement trigger).
POD-at-speed kill (end-2029) binding.
P4 incumbent check incl. Tecnar-class industrial laser-UT and Evident/Baker Hughes production NDT.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Highest-novelty dual seed (first NDT play in the pool); physics risk on thin reflective Al-Cu at line rate honestly named.

required_fixes: Coil-life gate (>=10,000 shots at spec by end-2028) binding - the entire engineering thesis.
CN integrator co-development agreement by 2028 with contractualized IP split (founder retains pulsed power + recipes; integrator sells).
Cost-per-joint and line-rate model vs ultrasonic AND laser welding by 2028 (laser is the real substitute).
Refresh L16-028 (2022) evidence.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Genuinely non-obvious productization of a 15-year non-productized process; correctly identifies coil economics as blocker-turned-wedge; technology-push honestly gated.

Best CN-primary seed of the wave: dated country-specific regulatory trigger (CCS Rules 2025 edition effective 2025-12-31, ~2-year revision cadence), national-benchmark vessel class, type-approval-dossier moat, honest JV structure (concede manufacturing, retain protection IP + type approval), clever $300k class-design-appraisal experiment, named CATL-bundling kill. P4: confirm non-CATL integrator/shipyard share, map CSSC-affiliated suppliers, scope DNV/ABS export hedge.

Demand real and dated (Baogang tender July 2026) but structurally captured: Huawei-ecosystem integrators self-supply, CRRC-class suppliers replicate the kit fast (no hard physics), foreign content in SOE mine-safety chains politically fragile (self-flagged), RMB3.75M tender scale implies project-shaped thin-margin revenue, atlas technical base admittedly thin. Demand without a defendable technical wedge in the hardest-access market.

B-12 precedent: in license-into-China know-how models the licensee is the accumulating asset. Seed names its own central mechanism as the kill risk (licensee R&D, poached teams); Hengyunchang's RMB1.5B IPO proceeds fund in-house capability; golden-reference retention does not survive the seed's own 2032 absorption horizon. IMPORT into F-01: licensing-with-golden-reference/test-bench structure and Hengyunchang/Injet buyer evidence as F-01's CN-chapter mechanics.

required_fixes: 2028 EPC retrofit-study partnership is the binding demand gate: measured park-level imbalance/stray-current losses must justify skid cost (>=3% gain target).
Keep the Sungrow/LONGi verticalization kill trigger (equivalent product before a 2031 pilot = kill).
P4: evidence that a licensed JV can win park-management retrofit scope at one named SOE park (no such tender exists yet; the audit-pressure trigger is inferential).
Boundary coordination with C-07 (rectifier) and F-23 (stack envelope): one L11 power story, three sockets, at most two funded.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Most elegant CN-primary framing ('string-inverter moment for hydrogen'); respects the L11 stack-overcapacity negative finding.

required_fixes: 2028 beta must carry a paid premium commitment - the >=30% premium thesis is tested before the 2030 gate, not at it (documented evidence is category procurement, not metrology-premium demand).
2027 experiment must validate inline surface-energy proxy robustness at line rate (the stated key uncertainty).
P4: Nordson MARCH/Panasonic/Samco roadmap check - closed-loop treat-to-spec is absorbable by the incumbent premium tier.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Converts the rejected B-15 knife-fight into a treat-to-spec premium position with a documented open procurement channel (L01-114) and durable category (L01-115).

required_fixes: Hold as a priced option: cap pre-company spend at the $150k prototype until a dated signal exists.

2028 gate: a documented ISO/IEC revision work-item, an EU/US market-surveillance action on handheld Class-4 welders, or an insurer/OEM requirement - one of the three, or kill at the existing end-2030 trigger.
P4 discovery lead: European welding-association handheld-laser safety materials (found by judge's external check; no dated enforcement found) - chase for an eligible dated anchor.
OEM design-in LOI remains the second gate.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Real gap (ISO 11553-2 dated 2007 vs documented export explosion) but the entire demand thesis is an undated regulatory contingency; adjudicated as an honest option purchase, D-16-style.

Self-flagged merge candidate: CN-primary licensing variant of F-03's cartridge in the same CNNC ecosystem with the same single-source TAM. IMPORT into F-03: EPC co-bidding memorandum concept, Xinjiang first-set timeline alignment, rollout-industrialization framing.

required_fixes: P4 must source operator incident/warranty data (seed's own flag: pain evidence is inference from spec structure + fleet scale).
2028 colocation pilot + one operator LOI binding.
The 12-month aging study must produce the failure-signature dataset that IS the moat; existing kill trigger (CDU vendors bundle equivalent monitoring before a 2030 design win) stands.
Boundary with C-05 confirmed (lab qualification vs in-service operations + consumables): pair commercially, do not merge prematurely.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Water-treatment-industry archetype applied to DLC fleets; the only F datacenter-correlated seed and partially downturn-resistant (installed fluid ages regardless). Counted against the datacenter cap (1/4).

required_fixes: P4 competitor map is a pre-promotion requirement: Spellman AND Advanced Energy (HiTek/UltraVolt), AMETEK/Glassman, Matsusada, iseg, Heinzinger, Technix, XP Power, CN HV makers - the 'effectively one dominant vendor' thesis must survive it or the seed collapses to niche lab supply.
Two paid OEM evaluations by 2028 binding.
CN leg reduced pending evidence: no eligible source shows CN accelerator OEMs outsourcing precision HV; name a CN OEM/tender channel in P4 or the CN chapter becomes license notes.
Pre-agree fold-down of the DC-HV line into C-09's platform family if OEM appetite fails.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: The thesis rests on a competitive claim held only as judgment; highest hidden-commodity risk among surviving F seeds.

Self-flagged fold candidate. IMPORT into F-02: catalog binary-lead SKU as entry product, instrumented feedthrough line, certified heat-load datasheets, end-2031 <$1M standalone milestone (becomes F-02's entry-SKU gate).

required_fixes: Vacuum-components manufacturing-partner route becomes a binding 2027 gate (precision brazing/bellows craft is both moat and barrier; a $450k experiment does not make a qualified line).
P4 must map existing CN vacuum-capacitor makers - if credible domestic caps exist, the CN licensing leg collapses; also verify the Comet/Jennings supply structure.
One OEM paid qualification by 2029.
Portfolio pre-agreement: if F-01 and F-22 both survive P4, merge into one RF-components company - two L06 RF-chain startups is one too many.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Single-source arbitrage (Comet 23.8% single-customer concentration, L05-034) with a sensible solid-state dual-track hedge bridging to F-01.

required_fixes: Binding 2029 gate: one named H2Hub lender/financier technical requirement or a developer LOI referencing instrumented warranty evidence, plus one OEM design-in agreement (the demand mechanism is anticipatory - developers buy only if lenders force).
The 2,000h A/B envelope-efficacy experiment must show a measurable degradation-rate reduction - the product's existence proof; binding.
Data-interface pre-agreement with C-22 (its benches calibrate F-23's maps); no duplicate bench build.
Scope (not assert) the battery/fuel-cell warranty retarget hedge by 2029.
f_seed_adjudication.notes: Most intelligent new L11 seed: converts published stress-degradation science into bankability hardware with genuinely independent US (H2Hub lender exposure) and CN (Kuqa-class utilization audits) legs.

HARD GATE 2028 (two OEM development agreements, secured as consultant/licensor pre-company); fallback merge into B-01/C-04 loop stack present; shipment-share kill trigger made binding.

v1 capex also capped $12-30M -> $10-25M per ruling.

new_flag_rulings_from_this_pass.reason: Seed's own text: State Grid domestic-only, CN revenue 'license royalties at best' - same honesty condition that downgraded C-12/C-21. CN license chapter stays in text.
CN leg thin (revenue attribution, not buyer evidence); P4 must name a CN pump/tool-OEM design-in channel or downgrade to US.
No eligible evidence CN accelerator OEMs outsource precision HV; P4 must name a CN OEM/tender channel or reduce CN chapter to license notes.

quota_reckoning.overall: NOT YET PASSING - CN gate at 35/36. The swing item is the honesty downgrade of F-06; reversing it to hit quota would fabricate CN credibility and is refused. Sensitivity: if F-04 or F-20 CN gates fail in P4, CN drops to 33-34; if F-17's undated trigger is disqualified at freeze, 34.
remedies_in_preference_order: Targeted micro-wave G of 2-3 CN-credible seeds in eligible-evidenced spaces no survivor uses: (a) CN big-science vacuum/components vs HEPS tender cadence (L07-045); (b) CN accelerator/cyclotron component localization vs mofcom centralized procurement (L05-036) beyond F-20's HV slice; (c) CN 800VDC conversion-base retrofit/commissioning instrumentation vs documented integration pain (L02-054), distinct from C-01's protection product. Route wave G through this judge before the longlist freeze.
P4-conditional upgrades already wired: evidencing F-04's named CN OEM channel or F-20's named CN OEM/tender channel lifts CN to 36-37 without new seeds.
Prohibited: resurrecting F-13/F-14, re-flagging F-06, or counting license-only CN chapters - quota-driven fabrication.
additional_flags: Stale source: L16-028 (2022) carries both F-10 and F-11 CN channels - refresh before final scoring (rule 18).
Single-source TAM: RMB100B sintering retrofit (L04-051) touches F-03/F-18 - triangulation is a pre-scale gate.
Concentration caps at portfolio selection: L06 RF chain (A-10/F-01/F-22/B-06); L11 max two of (C-07/C-22/F-15/F-23); L10 (A-21/B-14/F-05/F-07/F-12); fusion-correlated BOP (D-01/D-02/F-02/C-12).
